rows.content: HORIZONTAL SCROLL WITH CURSOR+ Indicate whether you want your cursor to
Y+- SPF/PC will scroll left or right by one when the cursor reaches
the left or right edge of the screen.  This is typical for PC
N+- The cursor will wrap to the opposite edge when it reaches
the left or right edge the screen.  This is typical of
3270-type terminals attached to VM or MVS systems.
MAX RECORD LENGTH+ Specifies the normal maximum record length for any
records that may be handled. Set this value to the longest record you
expect to process. The smaller the default maximum is, the more
efficiently SPF/PC will run. All internal buffers used to handle
records are allocated at the maximum record length.
